desc: Seeds default arrowheads and tag families per the Annotation Preferences Plan.
summary: Seeds default arrowheads and tag families per the Annotation Preferences Plan. Walks each known category, attempts to resolve via the three-tier resolver, and downloads from Supabase if absent. Idempotent — safe to re-run.
usecase: User opens a fresh model and wants every tagging command to "just work" without picking families.
notfor: Loading a single specific family (use AnnotationPreferencesDownloadFamilyFromSupabase directly).
precondition: Active document must be open. Internet access required for Supabase fallback.
postcondition: The standard MEP tag and arrowhead families are loaded into the active document.

preprompts: Seeding standard MEP tag and arrowhead families…
thinkingsteps: Checking which annotation families are already loaded…
successprompts: Loaded {LoadedCount} standard annotation families. {SkippedCount} already present.
